name: Design October candle label set
notes: Three seasonal labels for the Harbor Candle Co. fall collection. Earth-tone palette with hand-lettered scent names.

name: Build holiday social template pack
notes: Instagram story and grid templates for the Harbor Candle holiday push. Delivered as editable Canva and Figma sets.

name: Approve winter scent naming direction
notes: Priya to confirm the shortlisted scent names before lettering begins on the next label run.

name: Refresh candle tin top stickers
notes: Update the circular tin-top sticker with the revised mark and tighter kerning on the wordmark.

name: Develop stationery pattern system
notes: Repeating botanical pattern set for Maison Paper Co. notecards and wrapping sheets. Two colorways approved.

name: Prep print-ready packaging dielines
notes: Finalize dielines for the boxed notecard set and export print-ready PDFs with bleed and crop marks.

name: Shoot product imagery for BigCommerce
notes: Coordinate with Jasmine for flat-lay product shots, then retouch and crop for the Maison Paper storefront.

name: Draft spring campaign key art
notes: Two key-art directions for the Beacon Retail Group spring campaign. Hand-lettered headline over a warm gradient.

name: Collect Beacon brand asset feedback
notes: Diane to gather marketing-team notes on the banner set so the next revision can be scoped.

name: Adapt key art for email banners
notes: Resize the approved spring direction into responsive email banner sizes for the Beacon marketing send.

name: Lay out Hannah Kim lookbook
notes: Grid layout for the spring lookbook with generous margins and a serif-and-script type pairing.

name: Hand-letter logotype variation
notes: A brush-script logotype variant for Hannah Kim Styling to sit alongside the existing mark on social.

name: Confirm business card paper stock
notes: Hannah to choose between the cotton and the soft-touch stock so the print order can go out.

name: Export lettering assets as SVG for site
notes: Hand off the optimized SVG lettering set to Tyler for the lookbook page on the studio site.
